products.title: Claude Code HTML Presentation Prompt Pack
products.description: 25 ready-to-use prompts for generating polished single-file HTML slide decks with Claude Code or any AI coding agent.

products.title: Claude Code HTML Design Prompt Pack
products.description: 25 copy-paste prompts for frontend devs, indie hackers, and no-code builders.

products.title: Claude Code Skill: Architecture Overview Generator (Free)
products.description: One Claude Code skill that analyzes your codebase and generates a clear architecture overview — system components, data flow, service boundaries, and tech stack decisions. Trigger: /gen-architecture. Built for engineering leads onboarding new hires.

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Automated Report Generation — 5 Skills for Scheduling and Distributing Recurring Reports
products.description: For analytics leads and operations analysts, this pack covers parameterized report templating, scheduling logic, multi-format export (PDF, CSV, Slack), recipient segmentation, and delivery audit logging across 5 skills so they can eliminate manual report-running from their weekly workflow entirely

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Team Standards Bootstrapping — 5 Skills for Communicating Coding Conventions to New Hires
products.description: For engineering leads and DevEx teams, this pack infers coding conventions from existing code, generates a CONTRIBUTING.md from scratch, documents naming patterns and folder structure rationale, produces a linting and tooling setup guide, and creates a decision log template capturing why key architectural choices were made so new team members understand not just what the rules are but why they exist.

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Release and Changelog Documentation — 5 Skills for Communicating Code Changes Clearly
products.description: For DevOps engineers and release managers, this pack generates human-readable changelogs from git commits, categorizes breaking vs non-breaking changes, drafts release notes for end users, documents migration steps for version upgrades, and creates internal post-release summaries so they can ship releases with clear communication every time

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Codebase Onboarding Docs — 5 Skills for Getting New Engineers Up to Speed Fast
products.description: For engineering leads and staff engineers, this pack generates architecture overviews, maps module dependencies, documents environment setup steps, explains key design decisions, and produces contributor guides so new hires can become productive in days instead of weeks

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Database Migration — 5 Skills for Safe Schema Changes in Production
products.description: For backend engineers and DBAs, this pack automates migration script generation, rollback planning, pre-flight validation, zero-downtime column renaming, and post-migration verification so they can ship schema changes confidently without data loss or downtime incidents.

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Dashboard Delivery — 5 Skills for Translating Data Into Executive Insights
products.description: For analytics engineers and data product managers, this pack handles KPI narrative generation, chart annotation writing, dashboard layout recommendations, metric interpretation summaries, and executive briefing drafts so they can turn raw dashboard outputs into clear business communication without manual write-ups.

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Data Quality — 5 Skills for Pipeline Validation and Anomaly Detection
products.description: For data engineers and analytics leads, this pack generates data contract definitions, row-level validation checks, statistical anomaly detection rules, data freshness monitors, and incident summary reports so they can catch data issues before they reach dashboards or decision-makers.

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Sprint Planning — 5 Skills for Agile Ceremony Preparation and Execution
products.description: For agile team leads and scrum masters, this pack automates backlog grooming, sprint goal writing, capacity planning, story point estimation, and sprint review summaries so they can run tighter ceremonies in half the prep time

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Roadmap Planning — 5 Skills for Quarterly Planning and Priority Alignment
products.description: For product managers and heads of engineering, this pack builds opportunity sizing summaries, prioritization scoring matrices, now-next-later roadmap narratives, dependency mapping notes, and board-level roadmap presentations so they can move from chaotic feature lists to a defensible, stakeholder-approved plan

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Project Status Reporting — 5 Skills for Stakeholder Communication and Risk Visibility
products.description: For project managers and engineering leads, this pack generates weekly status reports, RAG status summaries, risk and blocker escalations, milestone progress narratives, and executive briefing snapshots so they can keep every stakeholder aligned without spending hours writing updates

products.title: Claude Code Skills Pack: User Story Writing — 5 Skills for Turning Requirements Into Actionable Tickets
products.description: For product managers and business analysts, this pack converts raw feature requests into well-structured user stories, acceptance criteria, edge case lists, definition-of-done checklists, and Jira-ready ticket descriptions so they can eliminate ambiguity before development starts

products.title: n8n API Authentication Troubleshooting Prompts by Auth Type
products.description: n8n developers struggling with OAuth2, API key, and webhook authentication failures get 20 precise diagnostic prompts to identify misconfiguration, token expiry, and scope issues across third-party integrations.

products.title: Claude Code Skill: DocSync — Automatic README and API Reference Generator
products.description: For backend developers, this skill scans codebases and auto-generates structured README files and API reference docs from functions, routes, and comments so they can ship well-documented libraries without writing a single doc line manually

products.title: Claude Code Skill: Postman Collection Builder — Convert API Docs or Specs into Ready-to-Run Postman Collections
products.description: For solutions engineers and technical support teams, this skill transforms OpenAPI specs, markdown API documentation, or raw endpoint lists into fully structured Postman collections with example payloads and environment variables so they can onboard clients and reproduce issues faster without manual collection setup.

products.title: Claude Code Skill: Integration Test Writer — Auto-Generate API Integration Tests from Endpoint Definitions
products.description: For QA engineers and full-stack developers, this skill reads endpoint definitions, request/response schemas, and example payloads to generate structured integration test suites so they can achieve consistent API coverage without writing boilerplate test code from scratch.

products.title: Claude Code Skill: Mock Server Scaffolder — Generate Instant API Mocks from Specs or Curl Examples
products.description: For frontend developers and QA engineers, this skill generates fully functional mock server configurations from OpenAPI specs or raw curl examples so they can unblock UI development and testing without waiting for backend endpoints to be production-ready.

products.title: Lead Nurture Content Brief Prompts for Content Marketers
products.description: Content marketers use these prompts to produce stage-specific nurture content briefs — from awareness to decision — mapped to real objections surfaced in sales conversations.

products.title: n8n Workflow Documentation Prompts for Team Handoffs
products.description: Solo n8n builders handing off automation projects to teammates or clients get 20 structured prompts to produce clear node-by-node documentation, trigger logic summaries, and maintenance runbooks.

products.title: n8n Workflow Error Handling Prompts for Automation Builders
products.description: n8n automation builders get 20 targeted prompts to systematically diagnose, document, and resolve node failures, retry logic gaps, and silent error conditions in production workflows.

products.title: ATS-Optimized Resume Bullet Rewriter by Job Description
products.description: Prompts that help job seekers paste any job posting and transform weak, generic resume bullets into keyword-rich, metric-driven lines that pass applicant tracking systems.

products.title: Shopify Product Description Packs for E-Commerce
products.description: 30 prompts for e-commerce store owners to write SEO-optimized, benefit-focused product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.

products.title: Meeting Notes to Action Items Fast
products.description: 20 prompts for project managers to instantly transform messy meeting notes into clean summaries, assigned action items, and follow-up messages.
